_purpose: Phase 5C — cross-element sanity chains (informational, no items.json mutation).

_pattern_compliance.pattern_13: Pair threshold gate with sanity sentinels
_pattern_compliance.pattern_20: Audit v2 section G — cross-element consistency chains
_pattern_compliance.pattern_31: CEV Matrix D cross-document consistency (post-Phase-5B verification)

1_okna.chain: Okna (PSV-76 Výplně otvorů ↔ DXF okno INSERT ↔ HSV-6 demontáž)
1_okna.rationale: DXF claims 16 okno INSERTs. PSV-76 sum 32 ks (should ≤ 16, allowing for some doors counted as okna). HSV6.013 demontáž 16 ks should equal 16.

2_sanit.chain: Sanit (PSV-72 ZTI sanit items ↔ DXF sanit INSERT)
2_sanit.rationale: DXF sanit INSERTs: 18 (WC=7 + umyvadlo=7 + vana=2 + sprcha=2). PSV-72 sanit ks sum: 24.0. Tolerance ±4 ks (item-vs-procurement-grouping variance acceptable).

3_krov.chain: Krov (HSV-5 krokve bm ↔ DXF kr_krokev INSERT 111 — combined krokve+sloupky+námětky)
3_krov.rationale: DXF kr_krokev INSERTs=111 combines krokve+sloupky+námětky per phase 0a tier4 audit. HSV-5 krokve item ~156.0 bm (typical CZ family ~24 krokve × ~6m = ~144 bm for ~150 m² roof). Combined insert count corroborates krov-system completeness without 1:1 mapping.

4_klempir.chain: Klempířina (PSV-76 Klempíř sum m/bm ↔ DXF MA_klempíř + SM__ klempířina 173.8 m)
4_klempir.rationale: Delta -8.0% within ±15% tolerance — matches Matrix D.4 verdict (Phase 3 CEV).

5_etics.chain: ETICS (HSV-7 ETICS kontaktní 276.7 m² + sokl 13.5 m² ↔ HSV7.006 omítka finální 290.2 m²)
5_etics.rationale: ETICS chain: kontaktní 276.7 m² + sokl 13.5 m² = expected omítka finální 290.2 m². Actual: 290.2 m². Delta tolerance ±5 m² (rounding in formula).

6_sklad_geometry.chain: Sklad room areas (Phase 3.5 DXF km_tabulka místností ↔ items.json)
6_sklad_geometry.rationale: Phase 3.5 + Action 1 cross-check verified (3 DXF rooms match items.json exact).
